Sports Betting

We use cookies and third-party cookies. You can modify the settings and obtain further information in our Privacy Policy. You accept its use by continuing the navigation.

We are licensed and regulated by the Ohio Casino Control Commission (OCCC) as a Mobile Management Services Provider, pursuant to and in accordance with the Ohio Administrative Code Chapter 3775 and Ohio Sports Betting Law House Bill 29. We offer Online Sports Wagering in the state of Ohio under a Type A Sports Gaming Proprietor license issued to MGM Northfield Park. Our online sports betting platform is tested by an independent test laboratory, which was approved by the OCCC to provide a sports betting system that is fair and operates correctly. Must be 21+ years of age or older to wager. OH only. If you or someone you know has a gambling problem, confidential help is available by calling 1-800-GAMBLER or visiting gamblinghelpohio.org

BetMGM is committed to providing a website that is accessible, regardless of technology or ability. If you experience any difficulty in accessing any part of this website, please feel free to email us at accessibility@betmgm.com.

Approved for real money gaming, Ohio.

Always bet responsibly

If you or someone you know has a gambling problem, call 1-800-GAMBLER for crisis counseling and referral services. Select your state of residence to view additional state-specific terms and resources.

Privacy Preference Center

  • Cookie Settings

  • Strictly Necessary Cookies

  • Targeting Cookies

  • Performance Cookies

  • Functional Cookies

Cookie Settings

When you visit our website, we may store or retrieve information on your browser, and allow other parties to do so, in the form of cookies and similar technologies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device. We use this information for a variety of purposes, such as making the site work as you expect it to. We, and third parties, also use some of this information to personalize your web experience, to provide you with advertisements based on your interests and for analytical purposes.

Using the category buttons on the left (or below on mobile), you can choose to disable cookies used for some of these purposes. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. Howeveer, disabling some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.

For more information about our privacy practices and your right to opt-out, please review our Privacy Policy. To submit a different privacy request, please click here.

Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the proper functioning of the website and our system cannot switch them off. They are set only in response to actions made by you during your visit. For example, they are fundamental for the proper visualization of the website, the setting of your privacy preferences, the login or the forms filling. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the website may not then work properly.

Targeting Cookies

These cookies are set to acquire information relating to users' behaviour when browsing the website, for advertising and marketing purposes. They allow the detection and, if possible, the prediction of the user's interests, preferences and habits. They can also be installed by our advertising partners, for building a profile of your interests and showing you relevant adverts on other websites. For this reason, your consent is requested to install them. If you do not allow these cookies, you will not experience targeted advertising.

Performance Cookies

These cookies allow us to analyse visits and traffic sources, in order to measure and improve the performance of our website. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the website. All information these cookies collect is aggregated. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Functional Cookies

These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and advance personalisation during your visit, such as the record of your access credentials, language settings, etc.. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies, some or all of these services may not work fine.
